title: Alibaba Cloud Qwen3-Next Instruct now available in Beta
body:
Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports Alibaba Cloud's [Qwen3-Next 80B A3B Instruct](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#qwen3-next-80b-a3b-instruct) as a Databricks-hosted model in the `us-west-2` and `ap-northeast-1` regions. This model can be accessed using [Foundation Model APIs pay-per-token](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis#token-foundation-apis).

Qwen3-Next 80B A3B Instruct is available in [Beta](/aws/en/release-notes/release-types). See [Manage Databricks previews](/aws/en/admin/workspace-settings/manage-previews) for guidance on how to enable this model based on your Databricks plan tier.
